feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Data Services
feed.subtitle: SAP Data Services Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: bods job fetches Invalid object name error
entry.content:
Hi All

A data setvices job ran with below error,

Please anyone help me with below error

entry.title: How to convert Chinese, Taiwan characters to English using SAP Data Services
entry.content:
We are retrieving data from the SAP table LFA1 in S4 HANA and transferring it to an SQL database. The data in the LFA1 table is in Chinese, specifically in the Taiwan language.

How can we convert this data to English using BODS? Kindly provide assistance in ensuring the successful loading of Chinese, Taiwan data into English


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP CPI-DS IBP Data Store - Imported Table View Data Function Not Working
entry.content:
Hi All,

After importing the Table from IBP in IBP Data Store. I am trying to view the data by using View Data option, it is throwing an error like " An error has occurred. Contact your administrator " .

The same View Data option working for other client environment of the CPI-DS and able to view the data in the View data screen.

I am attaching the error screenshot as well. Please help me to resolve this error.

entry.title: Unable to Import the BW4 ADSOs which is exposed by BW in CPI-DS
entry.content:
Hi All,

To integrate IBP to BW, we are trying to import BW4 ADSOs from CPI-DS with SAP BW-Target Data Store. but we are getting below error while importing the ADSOs.

We provided below information to import the ADSOs

After that we are getting the below error.

Pease help me to resolve this issue to import ADSOs in CPI-DS

Thanks & Regards,

Chandra Yenduri

entry.title: Data Transfer from Ariba to HANA database
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement, where I have API from SAP Ariba which is standard API to get vendor details, I want to push this vendor details data to HANA DB.

what are the different ways to do that?

can we use SAP BODS? If yes, can anyone share me good document for same?

Is SAP BTP has a capability to do the same?

Or if any other options available ?

entry.title: BODS unable to import Text datasources from ECC system
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have activated a set of BW datasources from Tcode-RSA5 in ECC system and they are now in active version in RSA6.

BODS system is able to view and import all of the ATTR and Transactional datasources, but not the text datasources. The import option is greyed out for text datasources in BODS and they are also marked with a red cross.

Is there some kind of additional setting required from ECC or from BODS side?

BODS system details- DS- 4.2 version

ECC system details - version- SAP ECC 6.0,

ABAP & Basis support pack 14 and BW support pack 16

Release - 11.2.0.4.0

Your help is greatly appreciated.

Thank You.

entry.title: Exit code error in ds job
entry.content:
Hi All

A child job of a parent ran with below error, may I get any clarification on this

entry.title: SAP Data Services 4.3 SP2 P1 and SAP Information steward 4.3 SP2 P1 compatibility with postgreSQL 13
entry.content:
Needed confirmation on compatibility of IS/DS 4.3 SP2 Patch 1 with postgreSQL 13 version


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Table Update not happening.
entry.content:
I have this data flow. The table comparison is generating many updates. The bottom row's mapping object (U)) changes the update to an insert. The updates are getting inserted to the debug table EMS_SHIFT_UDATES_DWS. The top row's mapping object (Update) is letting through updates as updates. The Updates are not getting written to the EMTIMESHIFTS table. The monitor shows both mappings have a row count of 2119.

You can see below the original data (first row of data) in the final table has actual times of 1900-01-01 00:00. The raw input data has an update to the actual times of nov 2023 (2nd row of data).

The debug table EMS_SHIFT_UPDATES_DWS, has rows from 2 different runs of the job. They have actual times of mov 2023.

The table to be updated EmTimeShifts did not receive the update, last row, still has actual times of 1900-01-01

The monitor shows 2119 rows coming out of the mapping object and 1 Upd Q and 2 Upd Q, but the Updates are not written to EmTimeShifts.

Update gate

The updates are not getting written to the EmTimesShifts table, any ideas on what I should check next?

entry.title: Any issues if not upgraded to SAP BODS 4.3 by Dec 2024
entry.content: My organization has SAP BO 4.2 reporting on BODS 4.2 . They have started moving to Snowflake as a data platform and also to other reproting tools and plan to do away with both BO and BODS. But that will be Dec 2025. Hence, they do not want to upgrade to 4.3 even though we know that P1 support ends in Dec 2024. I would like to understand what are the risks of having an unsupported platform considering that we have daily reporting dependent on successful data loads. Are there any specific areas that we may see issues if we continue to run on BO and BODS 4.2. ?

entry.title: images are not displayed on the Ariba screen
entry.content:
We are trying to isolate the problem because we are experiencing an event where images are not displayed on the Ariba screen.
As for the mechanism, we recognize that the image is downloaded from the external content server to the Ariba area periodically (first time and after 30 days).
We expect that for some reason, the acquisition (download) of images from the external content server to the Ariba area is not going well.
An image is attached for reference.
・Ariba領域への画像取得について.xlsx

So, please tell us the following three points.

1. I am aware that HTTP communication is used to acquire images from external content servers to the Ariba area, is this correct?
　If so, can you tell me the specific URL, etc. when downloading images?

2. Can you tell us the access source (IP address) when you retrieve (download) images from an external content server to the Ariba area?

3. Is there any way to check whether the image is acquired to the Ariba area?

entry.title: Bods job failed - process is not dumped
entry.content:
Hi All

A Data Services Job failed with below error. Please anyone assist me with this error.

 

 

Regards

Siba

entry.title: Product key 4.3 request
entry.content:
I need to obtain 4.3 product keys to upgrade to Data Services 4.3 per SAP Data Services Document Version: 4.3 Support Package 2 (IP_ADDRESS) – DIGITS-11-21 upgrade guide.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: The document can't be retrieved from the File Repository Server after Data Services installation.
entry.content: We have a Business Objects 4.2 SP5 installation on one server and have installed Data Services 4.2 SP10 on this same server.  After successful installation of Data Services, we are no longer able to open any reports in our Business Objects environment.  We have the ability to roll back to snapshot before installation.  What would be the correct course of action to successfully load Data Services without impacting the existing Business Objects installation?

entry.title: How to Abort Data Services Job Programatically ?
entry.content:
We have a Data Services job that "hangs" now and then, and never ends. In SQL Table  "AL_HISTORY" the column  "END_TIME" is NULL.

Is there a way I can programmatically identify this "hung" job, and create a process to automatically abort it, without a user having to abort it manually ?

PS. Is there a better place to post this question ? This was the best I could find.

entry.title: CPI-DS: ODBC SQL Server Wire Protocol driver]Prepared statement not a cursor-specification
entry.content:
Hello Team, We are facing intermittent issues when we are connecting to the below Azure synapse from CPI-DS when the overnight IBP jobs are executed but the same task runs successfully once we run it standalone.

We tried to analyze all the logs on Azure and CPI-DS end but doesn't give us any info on why it fails when we run overnight jobs. Can you help us understand how to check this ODBC error. 

 

Error in task: <qcdxxxxx01-ondemand.sql.azuresynapse.net> error message for operation <SQLDescribeCol>: <[SAP BODS][ODBC SQL Server Wire Protocol driver]Prepared statement not a cursor-specification

entry.title: RFC Communication failure-recurring data services job
entry.content:
Hi All

There are some recurring jobs running with below RFC Communication error during some of its executions. If a non-recurring job ran with this same error then we could have re-trigger it but what to do for a recurring job ?

Regards

Siba

entry.title: Is there a way to change the bulk load option for all jobs?
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We are using Data Services for ETL.

and We also used the bulk load option in the Job.

We want to change the bulk load option on every job.

But There are lots of job on Data Services.

I would like to ask if I can find a job that only uses the bulk load option among the numerous jobs.

Thanks,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Which SAP Data Services( BODS) 4.3 versions supports RHEL 8.6 or 8.9 ?
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We need clarification on below points, kindly do the needful.

1. We want to install SAP BODS on RHEL 8.9 OS, could you please let us know if this is supported?

2. If we choose OS RHEL 8.6 or RHEL 8.9 (without SAP Solution flavor), Does SAP provide the required repository and SAP hardening document which we can apply on plain SAP OS before installing SAP BODS?

Regards, 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Data Services Management Console URL
entry.content:
